name: Pagertree
description: Simple on-call scheduling and incident alerting service with rotation, escalation policies and status pages.

seo.title: Pagertree — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Pagertree: Simple on-call scheduling and incident alerting service with rotation, escalation policies and status pages.

when_to_use: Simple on-call rotation and escalation policy management
Alert routing from monitoring tools to on-call engineers
Status page integrated with incident alerting flow
Team schedule management with override capabilities

pros: Fast to set up for small teams
cons: Fewer integrations than PagerDuty or Opsgenie
Mobile app less refined than incumbents
Enterprise features thin on SSO and audit
review.verdict: Honest lightweight PagerDuty alternative; great for small teams but thin on enterprise depth.
review.best_for: Startups and small teams wanting basic on-call without PagerDuty pricing.
review.not_for: Enterprises needing deep AIOps, runbooks, or extensive integrations.
